headline: Henry Schein Inc. (HSIC): David Einhorn Is Buying This Health Stock
summary: We just covered 15 Under-the-Radar Picks from David Einhorn That Are Quietly Dominating 2026 and Henry Schein, Inc. (NASDAQ:HSIC) ranks 10th on this list. Henry Schein, Inc. (NASDAQ:HSIC) is a new addition to the 13F portfolio of Greenlight Capital. Filings for the fourth quarter of 2025 show that the fund owned 460,000 shares in the firm. […]

headline: Staar Surgical (STAA) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Q1 Release
summary: Staar Surgical (STAA) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
